resources.string: Your photos and videos, end-to-end encrypted on Proton Drive. Let\'s set up a few preferences so the app fits how you want to use it.
You can change this any time in Settings.
All photos and videos on your device, with any folders you exclude later.
Pick which folders to back up from Settings. Nothing uploads until you choose.
Browse what\'s already on Proton Drive without backing up new photos.
Choose how your photos travel from device to Drive. Everything is encrypted on top of these.
Remove GPS location from photos before they reach the cloud. Camera, timestamp and software details are optional. Recommended.
Upload files as 2026-05-30_14-32-08.jpg instead of IMG_2841.jpg. The on-device file stays as it is.
Once a photo is safely on Drive, take it off this device to save space. Other gallery apps stop seeing it.
Allow notifications so you can see backup progress and cleanup prompts, even when the app is closed.
We need read access to your photos and videos so we can encrypt them and back them up to Drive.

Strongly recommended. Lets the app edit, delete and rename photos and videos on your device without a system confirmation dialog every single time — used for in app editing, save back to device, the trash flow, and Delete after backup. Tap to open system settings.
Pick which folders should be uploaded to Drive. Items in other folders stay on this device only.
Tick folders you do NOT want uploaded. Anything else gets backed up automatically.
Allow access to photos first to see your folders.
No photo folders found on this device.
Mirror device folders as Drive albums?
Pick folders whose photos should also appear in matching Drive albums. Skip to keep everything in your photo stream only.
Made by one developer. Not affiliated with Proton AG. Source available, GPL licensed, no telemetry of our own.
Pick theme, accent color and language. All adjustable later from Settings.
Use biometrics or device credentials to unlock the app each time it returns to the foreground.
Asks for biometrics or device PIN every time the app opens or returns from the background.
Your settings are saved. Anything here is adjustable from the Settings page later.
Unofficial third-party app, not affiliated with Proton AG
Secure login with your Proton account
Your photos will appear here once synced.
Saved a copy to Photos for Proton
Original is read-only, saved as a copy to your gallery
Draw over faces or text to hide them
Choose how to save the edited photo to your Drive.
Choose how to save the edited photo. Backed-up originals stay in Drive.
Choose how to save the edited photo to your device.
Choose how the edit lands back in your Proton Drive.
Choose how to save the edited video. Backed-up originals stay in Drive.
Choose how to save the edited video to your device.
Uploads as a new photo. The original stays in Drive.
Uploads as a new file in Proton Drive — keeps the original.
Creates a new file in your gallery AND uploads a paired copy to Drive.
Creates a new file in your gallery.
Authenticate to view your hidden photos
No device lock set — the vault is not protected.
Authenticate to view your hidden photos
Backed-up photos stay in your Proton Drive — hiding only removes them from this device\'s gallery.
Long-press a photo in the gallery and choose \"Hide\"
Back up this photo first to share it with a public link.
Anyone with the link can view
Create a link anyone can open to view this photo. You can add a password or remove the link at any time.
Recipients must enter it to open the link
Some of these are stored only in the cloud. The app fetches a temporary private copy and hands it only to the app you pick. Nothing is added to your gallery or visible to other apps.
These photos will back up first, then join the album.
No albums yet. Create one above.
Mixed device and cloud only selection can\'t share an album cleanly. Pick one type.
Added %1$d to %2$s, %3$d item(s) couldn\'t be saved (mixed selection)
Added %1$d, %2$d more will be added after they back up
%1$d will be added to %2$s after they back up
Couldn\'t strip metadata from this file.
Could not add to cloud album
Enable a metadata category in Settings → Privacy first
Allow access to show local photos.
Media access denied. Open Settings to allow it.
Asks for permission to remove backed up photos from this device.
%1$d backed up photos ready to remove
Tap to clear them from this device.
Shows progress while backing up photos to Proton Drive.
Lets the app react to new photos in the background.
This deletes the album but keeps your photos in Proton Drive.
Some of these photos are backed up to Proton Drive. Choose how to delete them.
Moved to Recently Deleted, recoverable for 30 days
Keep the photos on this device, move the backups to Drive trash
Moves to device trash & Proton Drive trash
Moved to Drive Recently Deleted, recoverable
Drive quota, device space, app cache, recently deleted
End this session on this device.
Are you sure you want to sign out of your Proton account?
Plan, billing, privacy and telemetry controls on proton.me.
Browse your photos and files at drive.proton.me.
Download cloud full-res photos and videos on Wi‑Fi only. Thumbnails always load.
Connect to Wi‑Fi for full quality
Choose which folders to back up
Photos and videos upload within seconds of capture.
Auto-upload every photo and video on this device.
Photos in these folders won\'t back up, even while \"Back up everything\" is on. Already-uploaded items stay on Drive.
No folders found on this device
Mirror device folders as Drive albums
Pick which device folders also appear as Drive albums when their photos upload
Photos in checked folders also appear in matching Drive albums. Photos still upload to your stream either way.
%1$d photo(s) will be permanently removed from Proton Drive. This can\'t be undone.
Restored — pull down in your gallery to refresh
Photos deleted within the last 30 days\nwill appear here
They will be restored to your device gallery.
Cannot be undone. Photos will be permanently removed from this device.
They will be moved back to your Proton Drive photo stream.
Delete already backed up files from device
Every photo and video that\'s already backed up to Proton Drive will be deleted from this device. Drive copies stay intact and can be downloaded again later.
Thumbnails, streamed videos and temp upload blocks
This will delete %s of cached files. They’ll be re-downloaded as needed.
Remove GPS and optional EXIF fields from uploads
Remove GPS location before upload. Add camera, timestamp and software fields under Customize.
Apply the same metadata and filename changes to the on-device original, so the backed-up copy and the local file stay identical. This changes your original files.
Apply the same changes to the originals on your device
When backing up, apply the same metadata and filename changes to the on-device original, so the local file and the backed-up copy stay identical. This changes your original files.
Rename to capture date on upload
Use the photo or video\'s metadata to set the filename to its capture date and time before upload. Original device file is untouched.
Removes the local copy from your device after Drive has the upload — keeps the file only in your encrypted Proton Drive.
Strip GPS coordinates and location data
Strip make, model, lens and exposure data
Strip software, artist and copyright fields
Require biometric or PIN when opening the app
Re-lock the app after this much time in the background
Wipe viewed cloud photos from the cache when the app closes
Photos in hidden device folders won\'t appear in your main Photos timeline. They stay on your device.
Photos added to a Drive (cloud) album won\'t appear in your main Photos timeline. They still show in the Albums and Shared tabs.
Choose what to hide from your main Photos timeline. Hidden photos stay on your device and keep backing up.
Use the arrows to set the order of the category bar shown above your Photos timeline.
Hide individual albums from the timeline. The switch above hides them all at once.
Controlled by your Proton account settings. Open account.proton.me to change.
Photos hidden from the main gallery, unlocked with your device biometrics or PIN
Granted, deleting photos won\'t ask every time
Grant once to skip the per-delete confirmation
Albums created in Drive will appear here
Unofficial Proton Drive Photos client for Android. Open source and end to end encrypted.

Not affiliated with Proton AG. Proton, Proton Drive and Proton Photos are trademarks of Proton AG. Photos for Proton is an unofficial third-party client built against the publicly documented Drive API.
Free software under the GNU GPL v3, see the LICENSE file
City name dataset, licensed under CC BY 4.0
Shows progress while downloading an album in the background.
New name is the same as the current name
The public links will stop working and the photos will no longer be shared.
Can\'t leave this album right now
Removed %1$d of %2$d — some couldn\'t be removed
Couldn\'t save the album to your library
Albums shared with you will appear here.
Share an album or a photo to see it here.
Notifications are off. You won\'t see upload or download progress.
Type a name to start searching
A calendar view of your photos
Photos for Proton, displays your photos on the home screen
Configure how photos are displayed on your home screen.
Picks a random photo each cycle
Show photos from your encrypted cloud cache without exposing them to other apps
Could not play this motion photo.
Your unsaved edits will be lost.
Search by month, year, or description
Add a note about this day
A new version (%1$s) is ready to install (%2$d MB).
Version %1$s is available. Tap to install.
Could not check for updates. Try again later.
Allow installing unknown apps in system settings to update.
The update couldn\'t be verified, so it wasn\'t installed. Please try again.
You\'re offline. Some features won\'t work until you reconnect.
You\'re offline. Try again when you reconnect.
Backed up to Drive and on device
Saved %1$d of %2$d photos to your library
This photo is backed up to Proton Drive. Choose what to do:
Keep the backup in Proton Drive
Keep the photo on this device, move the backup to Drive trash
Moves to device trash AND Proton Drive trash
This will move the photo to Proton Drive\'s trash. You can recover it from Recently Deleted.
Back up %1$d selected to your Proton Drive?
Every photo and video in this folder will be backed up to Drive. You can also mirror the folder as an album.
One-time upload of the photos here to your timeline.
Keeps syncing — new photos in this folder join the album too.
Choose which folders to back up to Proton Drive. Selected folders will be uploaded automatically when syncing.
Pre-declare a folder so future photos in it back up automatically
Enter the exact folder name (e.g. \"Trip 2026\"). Once a photo lands in a matching folder it will back up automatically.
Enter a new folder name that isn\'t already added
Pending — applies when a folder with this name appears
Couldn\'t check what needs backing up
No locally cached backed-up photos to remove
Choose how to apply the new name to your cloud photo.
Choose how to apply the new name on this device.
Uploads under the new name, then moves the original to Recently Deleted.
Updates the file in place on your device.
Uploads as a new photo. The original stays in Drive.
Creates a new file in Pictures/Proton Photos.
We\'ll copy %1$d items into your library. They\'ll appear in your Photos as soon as the copy finishes.
The album will disappear from your library. The owner\'s copy and everyone else\'s access stay intact. You can be invited back later.
This version is no longer supported. Please update to continue.
Choose which notifications the app may show. Everything is on by default.

Show the always-on notification while the app watches for new photos. Backup keeps running and upload notifications still appear when it is off; new photos may just be picked up a little less instantly.
Show progress and a summary when you download an album to your device.
After a backup, remind me which photos are safe to remove from this device.
Removes GPS, camera info and software fields from this file
This will permanently remove %1$s from the file on your device. This cannot be undone.
This will move the photo to your device\'s Recently Deleted folder.
No albums yet. Create one from the Albums tab.
Could not move file to Hidden

plurals.name: viewer_add_photos_failed
plurals.item: Could not add %1$d photo to the album
Could not add %1$d photos to the album

resources.string: Fitting more photos per row can make scrolling less smooth in very large libraries.
Open your photos at the zoom level you last used
